PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?winner WHERE {
  ?show rdfs:label 'Celebrity Big Brother' @en ; wdt:P1275 wd:Q174683 .
  ?show wdt:P1324 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P585 ?airdate .
  ?season wdt:P2130 ?winner .
  FILTER(isBlank(?airdate) = false)
}
ORDER BY ?airdate
LIMIT 1
